entityTypes.name: seo_findings
entityTypes.description: A single SEO issue detected by the auditor sub-agent. Covers modern signals: Open Graph completeness, structured-data validity, Core Web Vitals, indexation, real GSC keyword performance, and AI-search citation visibility.

metric_value.description: Numeric or string value of the metric (stored as string for flexibility)

provider.description: Source of the finding: meta | pagespeed | gsc | geo:anthropic | geo:openai | geo:perplexity

entityTypes.name: seo_keyword_opportunity
entityTypes.description: An almost-ranking query from Google Search Console: position 5-20, impressions >= 100, CTR below run-median. Highest ROI source for blog topic suggestions.

opportunity_score.description: impressions * (1 - ctr) * (1 / position) — higher is better

suggested_target_url.description: The page that already ranks for this query (from the GSC page dimension), if any

entityTypes.name: seo_topic_suggestion
entityTypes.description: A blog topic suggestion routed from seo-expert to blog-writer to close a content gap or capture an almost-ranking opportunity.

current_position.description: GSC position at time of suggestion (if opportunity-driven)

entityTypes.name: seo_outreach_log
entityTypes.description: A simulated outreach attempt. Always status=would_send. Never sent externally.
